subcodes.first_line: O people of Bahá! The Lord of Names maketh mention of you, He at Whose finger's beckoning the heavens were cleft asunder [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل البهاء یذکرکم مولی الاسماء الذی باشاره من اصبعه انفطرت السماء و انشقت
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
